title: Decorative Wooden Lattices
description: Wooden lattices to decorate your buildings.
body:
![Decorative wooden lattices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f15f862d7614704e5e7c8504534cf4a0d59bb60e.png)

Beautify your buildings in Minecraft with Decorative Wooden Lattices, this fascinating mod offers you a wide variety of wooden lattices, with no less than 90 different models so you can personalize your buildings, houses and any structure you imagine. Whether you want to give a decorative touch to your home or buildings, these lattices are the perfect choice.
Explore your creativity and transform your constructions into masterpieces with Decorative Wooden Lattices.

Decorative Wooden Lattices features 90 lattices, wooden walls, and wooden frames.

_The texture of the lattices was changed to a custom stripped wood texture to give the lattices a better appearance._

![Lattices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f40ca6ec12186c3ab219b7fb1e87463de870af5.png)

_lattice 27 was replaced by another design_

![Lattice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b8888b7608efbecbdb2d1fdbc856be2fe674dfd.png)

**Frames and wall**

![walls and wall frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c25903e620ce0618a4781c991722aebc34642a4.png)

Mod available for versions: **1.18, 1.18.2, 1.19, 1.19.1, 1.19.2, 1.19.3, 1.20, 1.20.2, 1.20.4**
 
Crafting

planks and stripped log

![Crafteo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4b7bec633e83f23dc49650cb9288178dc27e791_0.webp)
